name: Blue Cheese Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in cool water.
2. Dissolve the gelatin over low heat.
3. In a food processor or electric mixer, beat together butter and cheeses.
4. Add egg yolk, mustard, and dissolved gelatin to the mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cheese mixture.
7. Fold in whipped cream.
8. Prepare a souffle dish with an inverted collar of oiled waxed paper or foil.
9. Secure the dish with string.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared dish, filling it over the sides and up to the top of the collar.
11. Chill for several hours or overnight before serving.
12. Remove the collar and serve with crackers or raw vegetables.
